posts.author: murphyslcp (Seth Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The ability to create private or shareable groups within a single board. Each group would have its own visibility and permission settings, enabling more flexible collaboration.

What are you trying to achieve

We want to manage multiple groups of information on one board while controlling who can see or collaborate on each group. This would allow us to:

  • Keep sensitive or internal data restricted to specific team members.

  • Share only relevant groups with external agents, clients, or stakeholders without exposing the entire board.

  • Avoid duplicating boards for different audiences, keeping workflows more centralized and efficient.
